description: Elite Editorial Accounting Platform specifically designed for the Dominican Republic fiscal market (DGII Compliance).

branding.colors_primary: Elite Red / Deep Slate / Crimson Accent

profiles.description: User account and business owner metadata.

invoices.description: Core fiscal engine supporting 606/607 and e-CF formats.

core_components_library.EliteDropdown: Custom headless UI dropdown with Arctic Glass styling and empty state handlers.
core_components_library.EliteSegmented: Modern slider-based toggle for document classification.
core_components_library.Sidebar: Expanded premium navigation with pop-out tooltips and overflowing menu support.
core_components_library.FiscalForm: Dynamic form engine with AI-Vision backfill capabilities.

recent_achievements: Implemented GIGA-MIGRATION v1.3: Resolved 400 Bad Request errors by synchronizing cloud schema with UI requirements (added address, phone, email, etc. to clients).
Elite Sidebar Refactor: Expanded to 410px to accommodate premium editorial content.
Grid Standardization: Migrated all dashboard pages to a consistent 12-column layout.
Dropdown Hardening: Fixed clipping issues caused by parent overflow constraints across the application.
Vision Sync: Unified variable naming (revenue_type) between AI parser, Database, and Export utilities.
